Four ways to wear it.

Every badge starts from one of these layouts, then gets customized to your name, colors, and style.

Double-sided printing. Always.

Every tier — Solo through Team — includes a fully custom front and back at no extra cost. Add a thank-you message, your hours, or a second logo on the back. Free, every time.

Why teams switch

Small habit, real results.

Always on you

Clipped on like ID gear — visible and ready, never left in a pocket or truck.

Feels professional

Worn like real equipment. Asking for a review feels natural, not pushy.

Zero friction

One tap or scan opens the review page instantly. No app for the customer.

Built to last

Stainless steel reel and clip, designed for daily wear on the job.

Actually yours

Your name, your logo, your colors — not a shared template everyone else has.

Results in week one

Better rankings, more trust, more calls. Most businesses see it fast.

How it works

From order to worn badge in under a week.

01

Send your details

Business name, logo, and your Google review link — that's all we need to start designing.

02

We design and print

Your badge is individually printed and programmed with your review link, not a shared template.

03

Clip it on, start tapping

Retractable reel clips to any uniform. One tap opens your review page — no app required.

Pricing

Priced by the badge, not the middleman.

Every tier ships free and includes full custom design — no setup fees, no subscriptions.

Built for how you work

30-Day Guarantee

Reviews don't grow? You get your money back.

We stand behind every badge. If your monthly Google reviews haven't grown by at least 15% after a full 30 days of wearing your Brixly badge, you're entitled to a full refund.

  1. Wear and use your badge consistently for at least 30 days after delivery.
  2. Track your review count before and after — a few screenshots or your Google Business Profile analytics are all you need.
  3. If the 15% increase doesn't show up, send us your before/after numbers along with your order details.
  4. We'll review your claim and respond promptly. Approved refunds are issued within 14 business days.
  5. Return shipping on the badge itself is covered by the customer.
Questions

Before you order.

What happens to my logo and business info once I send it?
It's used only to design and program your badge. We don't share it with anyone else, and it's not used for anything beyond producing your order.
How long does it take to receive my badge?
Most orders are designed, printed, and shipped within a week of us receiving your details.
Does it work with any phone?
Yes — it works with any NFC-enabled smartphone (which covers the vast majority of phones made in the last several years). No app required.
Can I change the design after I order?
Reach out before we print and we're happy to make adjustments. Once printed, changes require a new order.
